title: oxalis stenorhyncha
intro: Oxalis stenorhyncha, also known as the yellow woodsorrel or common wood sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oxalis stenorhyncha include its potential to treat urinary tract infections, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Oxalis stenorhyncha can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
